statement: In every magma, Equation 3033 (`x = ((y * (z * w)) * y) * u`) implies Equation 4517 (`x * (y * z) = (x * z) * w`).
lean_statement:
theorem problem_normal_0821
    {G : Type*} (op : G → G → G)
    (h : ∀ x y z w u : G, x = (op (op (op y (op z w)) y) u)) :
    ∀ x y z w u : G, (op x (op y z)) = (op (op x z) w)
